raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The 2019-20 state budget developed by Governor Newsom aims to improve California's future by expanding resources for disadvantaged communities.",
    "The budget aims to provide greater funding for healthcare and education while maintaining a modest reserve.",
    "The budget focuses on early childcare and education to better the lives of struggling families.",
    "The budget ensures that there is no discrimination in providing access to healthcare.",
    "One million Californians lack reliable access to safe drinking water.",
    "The budget allocates over $100 million per year from Greenhouse Gas Reduction Funds to communities to improve water quality.",
    "The budget includes over $1.7 billion for affordable housing initiatives.",
    "The budget offers $500 million in awards to cities and counties that meet new, short-term housing goals.",
    "$500 million in one-time cash will be provided to local governments to house the homeless, which is a significant increase from previous funding levels.",
    "The budget includes $500 million for 'missing middle' housing geared towards the middle class."
  ]
}
```
